---
title: "Count Regression Toolkit"
---

## Welcome

This website documents my Data Analysis II software toolkit for count regression.

## Launching the App

The Shiny app is included in this GitHub repository (https://dannymolyneux.github.io/).

To run the app:

1. Clone the repository from GitHub:
   https://github.com/dannymolyneux/dannymolyneux.github.io

2. Open R or RStudio

3. Run:

```r
shiny::runApp()
```

Or open the "app.r" file, and click "Run".

## Pages

Use the navigation bar to read about the project and view the vignette.
